commandsRun: WebSearch x10 fresh verification queries executed 2026-07-09 (brand SERP, Chicago Grill/Center Point Rd, Two Bros 600 17th St NE, LJS 1st Ave SE + Williams Blvd, Sugapeach relocation, Harold's 4330 16th Ave SW, Chicago Grill history, owned-site index check, head-term SERP sample, Pita Kabab)
assumptions: The archived, reviewer-passed 2026-07-08 Phase 1 artifact qualifies as a sealed prior-run research source per the dispatch guidance; it was used as baseline only, with load-bearing claims independently re-verified by fresh 2026-07-09 web checks.

The envelope shape rule (array fields as arrays of plain strings) applies to the five required artifact fields; competitorNotes and keywordEntityFindings are objects whose every array member is a plain string, which satisfies the rule while preserving reviewability.

SERP result-page titles and dated update stamps (e.g. Yelp 'Updated June 2026', review counts in page titles) are treated as Measured platform-displayed values; all demand metrics are labeled Estimated or N/A since no keyword-volume tool was connected.
verification: inspect-artifact run for phase 1 with specialist keyword-research returned ok=true with problems=[] on the final artifact (first attempt, no iterations needed).

All five requiredArtifactFields (researchSources, competitorNotes, keywordEntityFindings, sourceDates, evidenceGaps) present and non-null; every source in researchSources has a corresponding sourceDates entry.

Load-bearing sealed-research claims re-verified with fresh 2026-07-09 WebSearch: Chicago Grill returning brand CONFIRMED at 824 6th St SW (Center Point Rd detail from dispatch context found unsupported and quarantined to evidenceGaps); Two Bros open at 600 17th St NE CONFIRMED; LJS Williams Blvd open CONFIRMED and 1st Ave SE closure CORRECTED to June 2014 (Corridor Business Journal); Sugapeach summer-2026 relocation CONFIRMED in progress; Harold's operating CONFIRMED; stale Captains SW Yelp/Grubhub listings re-confirmed live and ranking.
Truthfulness floor honored: omit-never-fabricate; unresolved items (13) recorded in evidenceGaps; no search-volume figures fabricated (all Estimated/N-A).
artifactHash computed from final artifact bytes after the last edit; artifact untouched since hashing.
